ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text:
Beef Ragù Sauce (66%) [Water, Tomato Paste, Beef (7%), Onion, Thickener (1422), Carrot, Textured Vegetable Protein (Soy), Salt, Sugar, Garlic, Spices, Herb], Cooked Pappardelle Pasta (33%) [Wheat Semolina, Water], Parmesan Cheese (1%) (Milk).
May contain peanuts and tree nuts
